```{r,  echo=F}
  select(HGNC_name, our_logFC, logFC, nar_logFC, fc_rank) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(our_logFC, logFC, nar_logFC),
    names_to = "dataset",
    values_to = "logFC") %>%
  mutate(dataset = factor(dataset, 
                         levels = c("our_logFC", "logFC", "nar_logFC"),
                         labels = c("Our Data", "Mat Data", "Nar Data"))) %>% 
  filter(dataset %in% c('Nar Data','Our Data'))


ggplot(for_plot_long, aes(x = fc_rank, y = logFC, fill = dataset)) +
 geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 12)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = first_positive_gene, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = for_plot_long$fc_rank,
    labels = for_plot_long$HGNC_name,
    expand = c(0.02, 0.02) ) +
  labs(title = "matthaei degs with Host genes, ordered by logFC") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Dataset", values = c("Our Data" = "#1f77b4", "Nar Data" = "#ff7f0e"), 
    labels = c("Our Data" = "Nikitina et al.", "Nar Data" = "Chu et al.") )
```

и то же самое по нашим мирнк FC

## Our signif degs mirtrones + HG genes

сразу +2 HG. мб убрать забор, отсечь мелкий logFC. Тут сразу

Построим такой же график по миртронам и HG генам для наших ДЭГ миРНК.

```{r fig.width=11, fig.height=8, echo = F}

logfc_nar$gene <- str_remove(logfc_nar$gene, "HG")
logfc_our$gene <- str_remove(logfc_our$gene, "HG")

# all deg mirtrones  + hg 
for_plot <- diffexpressed_mirna %>%  
  left_join(mirtrones_mimat %>% select(gene_name, gene_id_mir), by = c('miRNA' = 'gene_id_mir')) %>% 
  #filter(!is.na(gene_name)) %>% 
  rename(in_gene = gene_name) %>% 
  mutate(
    in_gene = case_when(
      miRNA == "hsa-miR-1915-3p" ~ "MIR1915", 
      miRNA =="hsa-miR-30d-5p" ~ "MIR30D", 
      TRUE ~ in_gene)) %>% 
  left_join(logfc_nar, by=c('in_gene' = 'gene')) %>% 
  left_join(logfc_our, by=c('in_gene' = 'gene')) %>% filter(!is.na(in_gene)) %>% 
  mutate(MIR_gene = str_glue("{miRNA} ({in_gene})")) %>% na.omit() %>% 
  arrange(logFC) %>% 
  rownames_to_column('fc_rank') %>% 
  mutate(fc_rank = as.numeric(fc_rank))


first_positive_gene <- for_plot %>%  arrange(logFC) %>% filter(logFC >= 0) %>%  slice(1) %>%  pull(fc_rank) - 0.5

for_plot_long <- for_plot %>%
  select(miRNA, in_gene, logFC, our_logFC, nar_logFC, fc_rank, MIR_gene) %>%
    pivot_longer(
    cols = c(our_logFC, logFC, nar_logFC),
    names_to = "dataset",
    values_to = "logFC") %>%
  mutate(dataset = factor(dataset, 
                         levels = c("our_logFC", "logFC", "nar_logFC"),
                         labels = c("Our Data", "Mat Data", "Nar Data"))) %>% 
  filter(dataset %in% c('Nar Data','Our Data'))

#for_plot_long <- for_plot_long %>% filter(miRNA %in% cor_mir)

ggplot(for_plot_long, 
       aes(x = fc_rank, y = logFC, fill = dataset)) +
 geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = first_positive_gene, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = for_plot_long$fc_rank,
    labels = for_plot_long$MIR_gene,
    expand = c(0.02, 0.02) )+
  labs(title = "our degs (p<0.05) with mirtrones and Host genes, ordered by logFC") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Dataset", values = c("Our Data" = "#1f77b4", "Nar Data" = "#ff7f0e"), 
    labels = c("Our Data" = "Nikitina et al.", "Nar Data" = "Chu et al.") )
```

проверим по спм тоже самое, вдруг на наих логФС попадаются обравки генов, мелкие кусочки, нужно понять порядок спм каунтов, тк лфс нам этого не скажет

итог: гены родительские мирнк не смещены нив хай ни в даун

```{r fig.width=11, fig.height=8, echo = F}

means_our$gene <- str_remove(means_our$gene, "HG")
means_nar$gene <- str_remove(means_nar$gene, "HG")

# all mirtrones
for_plot <- diffexpressed_mirna %>% 
  left_join(mirtrones_mimat %>% select(gene_name, gene_id_mir), by = c('miRNA' = 'gene_id_mir')) %>% 
  #filter(!is.na(gene_name)) %>% 
  rename(in_gene = gene_name) %>% 
  mutate(
    in_gene = case_when(
      miRNA == "hsa-miR-1915-3p" ~ "MIR1915", 
      miRNA =="hsa-miR-30d-5p" ~ "MIR30D", 
      TRUE ~ in_gene)) %>% 
  left_join(means_our, by=c('in_gene' = 'gene')) %>% 
  left_join(means_nar, by=c('in_gene' = 'gene')) %>% filter(!is.na(in_gene)) %>% 
  mutate(MIR_gene = str_glue("{miRNA} ({in_gene})")) %>% na.omit() %>% arrange(logFC) %>% 
  rownames_to_column('fc_rank') %>% 
  mutate(fc_rank = as.numeric(fc_rank))


first_positive_gene <- for_plot %>%  arrange(logFC) %>% filter(logFC >= 0) %>%  slice(1) %>%  pull(fc_rank) - 0.5

for_plot_long <- for_plot %>%
  select(miRNA, in_gene, logFC, nar_mean_control, nar_mean_fecd, our_mean_fecd, our_mean_control, fc_rank,MIR_gene) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(nar_mean_control, nar_mean_fecd, our_mean_fecd, our_mean_control),
    names_to = "dataset",
    values_to = "mean_cpm") %>%
mutate(dataset = factor(dataset,
                          levels = c('nar_mean_control', 'nar_mean_fecd', 'our_mean_fecd', 'our_mean_control'),
                          labels = c('nar_mean_control', 'nar_mean_fecd', 'our_mean_fecd', 'our_mean_control'))) 


ggplot(for_plot_long, 
       aes(x = fc_rank, y = mean_cpm, fill = dataset)) +
 geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = first_positive_gene, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = for_plot_long$fc_rank,
    labels = for_plot_long$MIR_gene,
    expand = c(0.02, 0.02) )+
  labs(title = "our degs (p<0.05) with their mean CPM counts, ordered by logFC")
```

Вывод: не коррелируют с эксроессией чипа, сложности с определением похо

```{r}
for_plot %>% group_by(in_gene) %>%    summarise(
    unique_mirna_count = n_distinct(miRNA))  %>%
  filter(unique_mirna_count > 1)


for_plot %>% group_by(in_gene) %>%    summarise(
    unique_gene_count = n_distinct(in_gene))  %>%
  filter(unique_gene_count > 1)
```

# Check -5P/3P array expression difference

Проверим есть ли разница в экспрессии у миРНК у Control, Fecd, построим боксплоты по каждому.

Видим, что у fecd большая часть положительно скоррелирована, а Control -50\\50.

```{r contr_53p, echo=F, fig.width=11, fig.height=7}
mirna_pairs <- norm_data_cleaned %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("miRNA") %>%
  mutate(base_name = str_replace(miRNA, "-[35]p$", "")) %>%
  group_by(base_name) %>%
  filter(any(str_detect(miRNA, "-3p$")) & any(str_detect(miRNA, "-5p$"))) %>%
  ungroup() %>% filter(str_detect(miRNA, "-[35]p$"))

for_plot <- mirna_pairs %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(miRNA, base_name),
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "expression") %>% 
	mutate( Group = case_when(str_detect(sample, "C_") ~ 'Control',
															str_detect(sample, "Dfu_") ~ 'FECD'))

for_plot_duplicates <- for_plot %>% 
   filter(str_detect(sample, "C_")) %>% 
   mutate(type = ifelse(str_detect(miRNA, "-3p$"), "3p", "5p")) %>%
   select(-miRNA) %>%
   group_by(base_name, sample, type) %>%
   summarise(n = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
   filter(n > 1)

for_plot_long <- for_plot %>% filter(str_detect(sample, "C_")) %>% 
  mutate(type = ifelse(str_detect(miRNA, "-3p$"), "3p", "5p")) %>%
  select(-miRNA) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = expression,
    values_fn = NULL) %>% 
  group_by(base_name) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(`3p`, `5p`, method = "pearson")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(correlation)))

ggplot(for_plot_long, aes(x=reorder(base_name, correlation), y=correlation)) + geom_col() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 8) ) +
  labs(title = "Corelation between -5P/3P in Control", x = "miRNA base name")




```

```{r fecd_53p, echo=F, fig.width=11, fig.height=7}

# считаем корреляцию для каждой пары
for_plot_long <- for_plot %>% filter(str_detect(sample, "Dfu_")) %>% 
  mutate(type = ifelse(str_detect(miRNA, "-3p$"), "3p", "5p")) %>%
  select(-miRNA) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = expression) %>%
  group_by(base_name) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(`3p`, `5p`, method = "pearson")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(correlation)))

ggplot(for_plot_long, aes(x=reorder(base_name, correlation), y=correlation)) + geom_col() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 8) ) +
  labs(title = "Corelation between -5P/3P in FECD", x = "miRNA base name", y = 'Correlation')

cor_mir <- for_plot_long %>% filter(correlation > 0.3) %>% 
  mutate(a = paste0(base_name, "-3p"),b = paste0(base_name, "-5p")
  ) %>% select(a, b) %>% unlist() %>% as.character()
```

```{r both_corrs53p, echo=F, fig.width=11, fig.height=7}
for_plot_long <- for_plot %>% filter(str_detect(sample, "Dfu_")) %>% 
  mutate(type = ifelse(str_detect(miRNA, "-3p$"), "3p", "5p")) %>%
  select(-miRNA) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = expression) %>%
  group_by(base_name) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(`3p`, `5p`, method = "pearson")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(correlation))) %>% rename('FECD' = 'correlation')

for_plot_long <- left_join(for_plot_long, 
  for_plot %>% filter(str_detect(sample, "C_")) %>% 
  mutate(type = ifelse(str_detect(miRNA, "-3p$"), "3p", "5p")) %>%
  select(-miRNA) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = expression) %>%
  group_by(base_name) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(`3p`, `5p`, method = "pearson")
  ) %>% rename('Control' = 'correlation')
  , by='base_name') %>% na.omit()

for_plot_long <- for_plot_long %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Control, FECD ), names_to = 'Group', values_to = 'Correlation')


order_levels <- for_plot_long %>%
  filter(Group == "FECD") %>%
  arrange(Correlation) %>%
  pull(base_name)

for_plot_long <- for_plot_long %>%
  mutate(base_name = factor(base_name, levels = order_levels))

ggplot(for_plot_long, aes(x = base_name, y = Correlation, fill = Group)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 8)) +
  labs(title = "Correlation between -5P/3P in Control vs FECD",
       x = "miRNA base name")

```

# miR-29 analysis

уровни разбросов mir29 боксплоты (3х2), не прошли pvalue

```{r mir29box}

for_plot <- norm_data_cleaned[grep('hsa-miR-29[abc]', rownames(norm_data_cleaned)), ] %>%
  rownames_to_column("miRNA") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -miRNA, names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Expression") %>% 
  mutate(Group = case_when(
    str_detect(Sample, "C") ~ "Control",
    str_detect(Sample, "D") ~ "FECD")) %>% left_join(diffexpressed_mirna, by='miRNA') 

ggplot(for_plot,  aes(x = Group, y = Expression, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(show.legend = T)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitter(0.3), cex=1) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 10)) +
  labs(
    #title = expression("Differentially expressed miRNA (" * log[2] * ")"),
    #title = "Differentially expressed miRNA",
    #y = expression(Log[2]~"Expression Level"), x='') +
    y = "Expression Level", x='') +
  facet_wrap(~reorder(miRNA, logFC), scales = "free")
```

мир29 депрессед, таргеты её шарашат, как и в той статье.

разделение fecd/c

```{r}
v <- c('COL1A1', 'COL4A1', 'LAMC1')
for_plot <- bind_rows(
	cpm.symbol %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% v) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Nikitina et al.'),
	nar %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% v) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Chu et al.')
) %>% 
	mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      grepl("^Ctrl|^C_", Sample) ~ "Control",
      grepl("^FECD|^Dfu", Sample) ~ "FECD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    Dataset_Group = interaction(Dataset, Group))

ggplot(for_plot, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F) + 
	geom_jitter( position = position_jitterdodge(  jitter.width = 0.2,
      jitter.height = 0,    # Вертикальный разброс (0 = нет)
      dodge.width = 0.8     # Совпадает с position_dodge для boxplot
    ), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7)+ 
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~gene, scales = 'free') +
  labs(y = "Expression level (normalized counts)", x='')
```

пока что результаты согласуются - мир29 репрессирована в фекд, а её таргеты (которые они привели) обладают повышенной экспрессией. какие есть ещё потенциальные таргеты? их под 600, там есть почти все колы, можно плотнуть по ним.

```{r}
targets_table <- readRDS("/data7a/bio/human_genomics/fuchs_dystrophy/nanostring/analisys/RDS/targetsV10.RDS") %>% filter(`Support Type` != "Functional MTI (Weak)" & `Support Type` != "Non-Functional MTI (Weak)") %>% distinct()
```

all cols targets.

```{r fig.width=11, fig.height=7}
col_targets <- targets_table %>% filter(str_detect(miRNA, 'hsa-miR-29[abc]'), str_detect(`Target Gene`, '^COL' )) %>% pull(`Target Gene`)
for_plot <- bind_rows(
	cpm.symbol %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% col_targets) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Nikitina et al.'),
	nar %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% col_targets) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Chu et al.')
) %>% 
	mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      grepl("^Ctrl|^C_", Sample) ~ "Control",
      grepl("^FECD|^Dfu", Sample) ~ "FECD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_))

ggplot(for_plot, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F) + 
	#geom_jitter(aes(fill = Group), position = position_jitterdodge(  jitter.width = 0.2, jitter.height = 0, dodge.width = 0.8), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~gene, scales = 'free') 
```

объединим из статьи + коллагены

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
col_targets <- targets_table %>% filter(str_detect(miRNA, 'hsa-miR-29[abc]'), str_detect(`Target Gene`, '^COL' )) %>% pull(`Target Gene`) 

col_targets <- append(col_targets, 'LAMC1')

for_plot <- bind_rows(
	cpm.symbol %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% col_targets) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Nikitina et al.'),
	nar %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% col_targets) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Chu et al.')
) %>% 
	mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      grepl("^Ctrl|^C_", Sample) ~ "Control",
      grepl("^FECD|^Dfu", Sample) ~ "FECD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_))

ggplot(for_plot, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F) + 
	#geom_jitter(aes(fill = Group), position = position_jitterdodge(  jitter.width = 0.2, jitter.height = 0, dodge.width = 0.8), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~gene, scales = 'free') +
  labs(x='', y='Expression in CPM')
```

all targets

```{r fig.width=15, fig.height=11}
col_targets <- targets_table %>% filter(str_detect(miRNA, 'hsa-miR-29[abc]')) %>% pull(`Target Gene`)

for_plot <- bind_rows(
	cpm.symbol %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% col_targets) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Nikitina et al.'),
	nar %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% col_targets) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Chu et al.')
) %>% 
	mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      grepl("^Ctrl|^C_", Sample) ~ "Control",
      grepl("^FECD|^Dfu", Sample) ~ "FECD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_))

ggplot(for_plot, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F) + 
	geom_jitter(aes(fill = Group), position = position_jitterdodge(  jitter.width = 0.2,
      jitter.height = 0, dodge.width = 0.8), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~gene, scales = 'free') 
```

надо бы все эти таргеты прогнать через тест и дэг глянуть. + объединить их по kegg в какую-то структуру только logFC \> +1

```{r fig.width=15, fig.height=11}
mir29_fc <- for_plot %>%
  group_by(gene, Dataset, Group) %>%
  summarise(mean_expression = mean(Expression, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = mean_expression, names_prefix = "mean_") %>%
  mutate(
    FC = mean_FECD / mean_Control,
    log2FC = log2(FC)) %>%
  ungroup()
#saveRDS(mir29_fc, file="/data7a/bio/human_genomics/fuchs_dystrophy/nanostring/analisys/RDS/mir29_targets.RDS")

# Отбираем гены с |log2FC| > 1 (Fold Change > 2 или < 0.5)
v <- mir29_fc %>%
  filter((log2FC) > 1) %>%
  arrange(Dataset, desc((log2FC)))


for_plot_long <- for_plot %>%  filter(gene %in% v$gene)

ggplot(for_plot_long, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F) + 
	geom_jitter(aes(fill = Group), position = position_jitterdodge(  jitter.width = 0.2,
      jitter.height = 0, dodge.width = 0.8), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~gene, scales = 'free') 
```

kegg по таргетам дал похожий результат, как и в fecd таргетах (p adj sorted)

![](images/clipboard-1652604402.png)

отберём топ 8 с + связью и - связью по FC

```{r fig.width=15, fig.height=11}
top_miRNA <- mir29_fc %>% distinct(gene, log2FC) %>% arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
  {bind_rows(slice_head(., n = 8), slice_tail(., n = 8))} %>% pull(gene) %>% unique()          

for_plot_long <- for_plot %>% filter(gene %in% top_miRNA) %>% 
	left_join(mir29_fc, by=c('gene', 'Dataset'))

ggplot(for_plot_long, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F) + 
	geom_jitter(aes(fill = Group), position = position_jitterdodge(  jitter.width = 0.2,
      jitter.height = 0, dodge.width = 0.8), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~~reorder(gene, log2FC), scales = 'free')
```

в control парах (где много) коррелирует с BCL2, мб какие-то апоптотические фишки.

глянуть их дерегуляцию - незначительные изменения, можно написать

```{r }
v <- c('DICER1', 'DROSHA',  'DGCR8')
for_plot <- bind_rows(
	cpm.symbol %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% v) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Nikitina et al.'),
	nar %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% v) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Chu et al.')
) %>% 
	mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      grepl("^Ctrl|^C_", Sample) ~ "Control",
      grepl("^FECD|^Dfu", Sample) ~ "FECD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    Order = case_when(gene == 'DICER1' ~ 1, gene == 'DROSHA' ~ 2, gene == 'DGCR8' ~ 3))

ggplot(for_plot, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F,position = position_dodge(width = 1)) + 
	geom_jitter(aes(fill = Group), position = position_jitterdodge(  jitter.width = 0.2,       jitter.height = 0, dodge.width = 0.8), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~ reorder(gene, Order), scales = 'free') +
  labs(y = "Expression level (normalized counts)", x='')
```

### mir 630!

```{r}
v <- targets_table %>% filter(str_detect(miRNA, 'hsa-miR-630')) %>% pull(`Target Gene`)
for_plot <- bind_rows(
	cpm.symbol %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% v) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Nikitina et al.'),
	nar %>% rownames_to_column('gene') %>% filter(gene %in% v) %>% 
		pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = 'Sample', values_to = 'Expression') %>% 
		mutate(Dataset = 'Chu et al.')
) %>% 
	mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      grepl("^Ctrl|^C_", Sample) ~ "Control",
      grepl("^FECD|^Dfu", Sample) ~ "FECD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_))

ggplot(for_plot, aes(x=Dataset, y=Expression, fill = Group))	+ geom_boxplot(outliers = F) + 
	geom_jitter(aes(fill = Group), position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2,
      jitter.height = 0, dodge.width = 0.8), size=0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#00BFC4", "FECD" = "#F8766D")) +
	facet_wrap(~gene, scales = 'free') +
  labs(y = "Expression level (normalized counts)", x='')
```

Как будто 630 практически ни на что не влияет, только есть snai2 - EMT change

про иммунку можно написать, вместе с оверэкспрессией hla, но непонятно что там

цветом покраси. среднее по вектору нарис рядом. для тех у кого есть хост построить корр плот кто лучше с хостом коррелируют

скаттерплот средняя экспрессия (по 3 и по 5) против корреляции по фекд-контролю.

пересчитать корр по фекд и контрол отдельно

уточнить про таргеты 29 в базе таргетов, по а б с

хосты

```{r, eval=F}

all_plot_data <- long_data %>%
  mutate(type = ifelse(str_detect(miRNA, "-3p$"), "3p", "5p")) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = expression)

ggplot(all_plot_data, aes(x = `3p`, y = `5p`)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ base_name, scales = "free") +
  labs(title = "Корреляция между -3p и -5p формами miRNA",
       x = "Экспрессия -3p",
       y = "Экспрессия -5p") +
  theme_minimal()


```

### Вытаскиваем список всех миРНК в чипе, чтобы потом получить их координаты из аннотации

```{r formatting_names_allchip_mirna}
chip_names <- rownames(norm_data)
chip_names <- sapply(chip_names, toupper)
chip_names <- gsub('HSA-', '', chip_names)
chip_names <- as.data.frame(chip_names, row.names = NULL)
colnames(chip_names) <- 'HGNC_name'

# сохраняем исходное имя мирнк для таблицы с таргетами
chip_names$miRNA <- row.names(chip_names)

# выделяем 5/3p в колонку
# если не указан стрэнд - пишем 5p
chip_names$mir_strand <- ifelse(grepl("5P", chip_names$HGNC_name), "5P",
                             ifelse(grepl("3P", chip_names$HGNC_name), "3P", "5P"))


# сокращаем название (удаляем 5P 3P) 
# раньше удалял все "-", теперь оставляем тк есть имена 1185-2
chip_names$HGNC_name <- gsub('-5P', '', gsub('-3P', '', chip_names$HGNC_name))


# вынести в отдельную колонку суффикс, как и в аннот.
# надо ли это делать? мб будет сложнее сметчить по колонкам
# как будто проще потом дометчить по другой колонке
# пока уберём
# chip_names <- separate(chip_names, HGNC_name, into = c("HGNC_name", "name_suffix"), sep = "-", remove = F)


# удаляем первое вхождение "-"
# тк в HGNC MIR пишется слитно с цифрой
chip_names$HGNC_name <- sub("-", "", chip_names$HGNC_name)


# добавляю MIMAT id
chip_names <- merge(chip_names, other_data[, c("Probe Name", "Accession #")], 
                          by.x = "miRNA", by.y = "Probe Name")
chip_names <- rename(chip_names, 'MIMAT_ID' = "Accession #")


# LET7A --> MIRLET7A
# изменим это в изначальном chip, тк имена должны быть как в анноте
chip_names$HGNC_name <- gsub("^LET", "MIRLET", chip_names$HGNC_name)
chip_names$HGNC_name <- gsub("MIRLET7A", "MIRLET7A", chip_names$HGNC_name)

# MIR1+MIR2+MIR3 --> MIR1
# есть мирнк через +, оставим только 1ю часть
# части после + пока уберём
chip_names$HGNC_name <- sub("\\+.*", "", chip_names$HGNC_name)

# Удаляем миРНК, отозванные из аннотации
# 10.02.25 - не будем удалять
# chip_names <- chip_names %>%
#   filter(!grepl("MIR1254|MIR4461|MIR4532|MIR4792|MIR566", HGNC_name))

# MIR92A-1 --> MIR92A1
# удаляем лишний дефис в названиях
# мержим по полному имени
chip_names$HGNC_name <- gsub("(MIR[0-9]+[A-Z]+)-([0-9]+)", "\\1\\2", chip_names$HGNC_name)

saveRDS(chip_names, file="/data7a/bio/human_genomics/fuchs_dystrophy/nanostring/analisys/RDS/chip_names.RDS")
```

```{r samples_vector, eval=F}
# вытащим назв-я образцов в правильном виде (а зачем?)
samples_names <- colnames(norm_data)
samples_names <- gsub("^C_(\\d+)$", "C_2\\1", samples_names) 
samples_names <- gsub("^D_(\\d+)$", "D_2\\1", samples_names)  
# saveRDS(samples_names, file="/data7a/bio/human_genomics/fuchs_dystrophy/nanostring/analisys/RDS/samples_names.RDS")
```

Мы получили список дифэкспрессированых микроРНК и список всех микроРНК генов в чипе. Исправили названия для последующей обработки. На этом 1 этап анализа завершён.

# Конец 1 части анализа

------------------------------------------------------------------------
